# Two Treatises of Government

*[John Locke](../philosophers/locke.md) · 1689*

The founding text of political liberalism. Having refuted the divine right of kings, Locke grounds legitimate power on the consent of the governed, anchors property in labour, and grants the people a right of resistance against power that betrays its end, the preservation of natural rights.
